title: KRU Fiery Tacos al Pastor
description: Quick weeknight tacos with a smoky kick.
ingredients: Pork shoulder, KRU Fiery sauce, pineapple, red onion, cilantro, corn tortillas, lime.
steps: 1. Marinate pork in Fiery for 30 min. 2. Sear on high heat until charred. 3. Assemble with pineapple, onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.
